---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for arc-starter
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.

**Example:** I want to integrate with Telegram, but there's no channel example for it.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Example:** Add a Telegram channel example similar to the Discord channel, with instructions for setting up a bot token.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, code examples, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Use Cases

Describe how this feature would be used:

1. Use case 1: ...
2. Use case 2: ...

## Impact

Who would benefit from this feature? How would it improve arc-starter?

## Implementation Notes

(Optional) If you have ideas about how to implement this, share them here.
